_description: All buildings available for construction. One of each per colony. BP can be spread over multiple turns. Max 3 RM converted to BP per turn.
_notes: Partially constructed buildings cannot lose committed BP. Can only put BP towards one building per turn. Reclaiming: destroy building, receive half BP cost (rounded down) as Raw Materials.

buildings.name: Academy
buildings.description: Educating young colonists to be scientists. Earn +1 Research Point every campaign turn.

buildings.name: Adapted Protective Shield Installation
buildings.description: Local building materials provide increased resilience. Increase Colony Integrity by +3.

buildings.name: Advanced Manufacturing Plant
buildings.description: A prerequisite to produce any Tier 1 equipment.

buildings.name: Advanced Medical Center
buildings.description: Select any one character and reduce their injury recovery time by 1 turn during Recovery step.

buildings.name: AI-Assisted School
buildings.description: All new characters enter the campaign with 2 XP.

buildings.name: Biological Adaptation Research Site
buildings.description: Receive 2 Augmentation Points.

buildings.name: Bot Maintenance Bay
buildings.description: Repaired bots can now be deployed during the same campaign turn.

buildings.name: Civilian Market
buildings.description: Gain 1 Story Point.

buildings.name: Colony Shield Network
buildings.description: Mitigate 1 Colony Damage each time you receive Colony Damage.

buildings.name: Cybernetics Facility
buildings.description: Receive 1 Augmentation Point.

buildings.name: Damage Containment Centre
buildings.description: Your colony repair rate is increased by +1.

buildings.name: Drone Turret Network
buildings.description: Gain 1 point of Colony Defenses.

buildings.name: Early Warning System
buildings.description: Gain 1 point of Colony Defenses.

buildings.name: Environmental Control Facility
buildings.description: Gain 1 Story Point. Increase Colony Morale by +2.

buildings.name: Expanded Living Facility
buildings.description: You may expand your character roster by 2.

buildings.name: Hardened Life Support System
buildings.description: Increase Colony Integrity by +2.

buildings.name: Heavy Construction Site
buildings.description: Earn +1 Build Point per campaign turn.

buildings.name: High Tech Manufacturing Plant
buildings.description: A prerequisite to produce any Tier 2 equipment. Requires completed Advanced Manufacturing Plant.

buildings.name: Locally Adapted Food Production Site
buildings.description: Increase Colony Morale by +5. One-time bonus.

buildings.name: Med-Evac Shuttle Facility
buildings.description: Once per turn, a casualty may roll twice on the injury table and pick the better result.

buildings.name: Military Barracks
buildings.description: All current and future troopers gain 3 XP immediately.

buildings.name: Military Training Facility
buildings.description: During Experience Progression, one character may conduct military training for +1 XP.

buildings.name: Militia Training Camp
buildings.description: Any civvies brought on a mission will have Reactions 2.

buildings.name: Patrol Base
buildings.description: Gain 1 point of Colony Defenses.

buildings.name: Protective Shelter
buildings.description: Increase Colony Integrity by +2.

buildings.name: Rapid Response Network
buildings.description: Gain 1 point of Colony Defenses.

buildings.name: Recreational Facility
buildings.description: Gain 1 Story Point. Increase Colony Morale by +1.

buildings.name: Remote Extraction Site
buildings.description: Each campaign turn, roll 1D6: On 5-6, receive one additional Raw Material.

buildings.name: Remote Research Station
buildings.description: Each campaign turn, roll 1D6: On 5-6, receive one additional Research Point.

buildings.name: Research Laboratory
buildings.description: Earn +1 Research Point every campaign turn.

buildings.name: Resource Processing
buildings.description: +1 Raw Materials when received from any source.

buildings.name: Satellite Launch Facility
buildings.description: Select 3 unexplored/exploited sectors, +1 Resource Value each, +1 Mission Data.

buildings.name: School of Theoretical Sciences
buildings.description: Earn +1 Research Point every campaign turn.

buildings.name: Scientific Training Facility
buildings.description: All current and future scientists gain +3 XP. +1 Mission Data.

buildings.name: Scout Drone Network
buildings.description: Sectors with Hazard 5-6 reduced by 1. +1 Mission Data.

buildings.name: Scout Facilities
buildings.description: All current and future scouts gain +3 XP. +1 Mission Data.

buildings.name: Galactic Comms Relay
buildings.description: Establishes large-scale communications. Grants 1 Milestone. Add 1 Story Point.

buildings.name: Genetic Adaptation Facility
buildings.description: Large-scale adaptation to local environment. Grants 1 Milestone. Gain 2 Augmentation Points.

buildings.name: Orbital Facility
buildings.description: Spacefaring vessel construction. Grants 1 Milestone. Add 5 Colony Morale.

buildings.name: Terraforming Control Center
buildings.description: First steps towards atmospheric adjustments. Grants 1 Milestone. Increase Integrity by +3.
